title: stipa scabra subsp. falcata
intro: Stipa scabra subsp. falcata, also known as bent or rough brome, is a type of grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stipa scabra subsp. falcata include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can be found in some traditional medicine practices, particularly in Asian cultures.
